summary: CP8 validator passed: theme API returns valid taxonomy labels and sentiments, spam exclusion is counted, quotes stay masked, low-volume warning exists, and ThemesPage displays the insight output.

checks.name: CHECK-01: Theme API response
checks.expected: themes with label, dominant_sentiment, post_count, sample_quotes
checks.actual: 4 themes returned with posts_crawled=12 and all required fields

checks.name: CHECK-05: PII masked quotes
checks.command: Regex scan of sample_quotes from theme API
checks.actual: No phone or email patterns found in any sample quote

checks.name: CHECK-06: Low post count warning
checks.actual: InsightService returns 'It hon 10 posts nen theme chi mang tinh dai dien.' when clean posts are low

checks.name: CHECK-07: ThemesPage UI
checks.expected: Theme rendering with sentiment labels and quotes
checks.actual: ThemesPage renders theme cards, sentiment badges, and sample quotes
